diagnostic_playbooks.symptom: UI shows stale or wrong build/session data
likely_causes: DB write failed or wrong tenant filter
AI repair wrote state to wrong location
checks: Compare UI state with API response
Inspect request trace ID end-to-end
Check Redis key TTL and tenant-scoped key
Query DB row updated_at/status/version
Check queue lag and worker logs
Check last deploy diff and feature flag exposure
Check contract build_session status enum

decision_tree.if: API response correct but UI wrong
decision_tree.then: Inspect state management, cache invalidation, component props, stale closure, optimistic update rollback.

decision_tree.if: API response stale and Redis hit
decision_tree.then: Invalidate cache path and fix write-through/cache-key tenant/version issue.
Inspect service query/cache path and serialization contract.
Scale worker or fix stuck job/retry/DLQ issue.

safe_repair_plan: Trace from UI request ID to DB/queue/worker.
Add contract/e2e regression test for status update visibility.
Run focused tests and validate telemetry.
rollback_plan: Restore previous deployment if session visibility remains degraded.

diagnostic_playbooks.symptom: AI generated broken or incomplete code
likely_causes: Tool executor applied diff to wrong file
Build runner did not run correct command
checks: Inspect context bundle contents and omitted-file risk
Review changed files and dependency graph
Run build/test/lint command from Build Runner
Check contract violations
Compare generated code against schema/API contracts
Review AI decision trace: why each file was touched
Inspect provider/model/cost/fallback logs

decision_tree.then: Expand context around dependency owners and regenerate minimal patch.
Repair producer/consumer mismatch, not just UI symptoms.
Fix repo map/code-location index and require owner-match before write.

safe_repair_plan: Record why files were touched and rollback diff.
rollback_plan: Mark context-selector rule as unsafe until fixed.

diagnostic_playbooks.symptom: Model/provider cost spike or dollar ticker mismatch
checks: Compare estimated vs actual provider usage
Inspect retry/fallback count
Check model routing decision
Check context bundle token size
Check usage_events DB rows
Check BYOK credential path and provider account used

decision_tree.then: Fix token estimator and context pruning.
Fix BYOK route authorization and billing attribution.

safe_repair_plan: Add budget guardrail in model router.
Add regression test for cost attribution.
